recordings.human_judgment: Stable minor-key center, persistent repeating groove, low transition novelty, moderate arrangement density.

recordings.filename: Sergio Mendes - Never Gonna Let You Go (128k).wav
recordings.human_judgment: Frequent functional chord movement and tonicization should exceed the repeated pop-loop movement score.
A persistent modal loop should show repetition and tonal centering without being treated as repeated modulation.
Color tones and sampled jazz voicings should raise deviation and density while repeated movement limits novelty.
Dense voicings and active harmonic rhythm should rank above the diatonic pop fixture without relying on chromaticity alone.
